filling_rules: Select 'Head Constable (Communication)' or appropriate post as per profile.
Check 'Yes' for community belonging (Gorkhas/Dogras) only if explicitly in profile.
Identification Mark 1 and 2 are mandatory. Use Mole/Cut marks from profile.
Identity Card Type and Number must match the selected document.
Educational table: Fill Matric, Inter, Diploma, Graduation, PG in order.
ssb.document_rules: All certificates should be in PDF or JPG as per site prompt.

filling_rules: Select 'Prakhand' (Block) and 'Anumandal' (Sub-division) based on profile address.
Select 'Type of Local Body' (Gram Panchayat, Nagar Nigam, etc.) correctly.
Check 'I Agree' checkbox at the end of the form.
Use Hindi translations where labels are bilingual.
Upload 'Self attested photograph' to the specific file input.
bihar_serviceplus.document_rules: Aadhaar number is optional but improves processing.

filling_rules: Map 'Category' and 'Caste' specific selection accurately.
If 'Caste Serial Number' is explicitly required, map from profile.
Upload applicant photograph as required.
Manually break down income into Govt, Agriculture, Business, and Other sources.
Aggregate values to match 'Total Income' field.
Ensure the 'Income sources' match the supporting documents (Salary slip/ITR).
Identify if 'State Govt' or 'Central Govt' purpose is selected.
NCL requires detailed parent/husband status (Govt Service, Salary, etc.).
Check multiple 'Yes/No' radio buttons for creamy layer criteria.
Fill 'Last 2 years domicile details' table systematically from profile history.
Ensure 'From' and 'To' dates are consecutive and cover exactly 2 years.
Match 'Police Station' (Thana) exactly with site's dropdown options.
